inputs.label: Swing Speed
inputs.businessContext: Club head speed at impact, typical driver 90-110 mph.

inputs.label: Loft Angle
inputs.businessContext: Effective loft angle of the club. Driver ~9-12°, irons higher.

inputs.label: Elevation
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level affecting air density. Higher elevation = longer carry.

inputs.label: Wind Speed
inputs.businessContext: Wind speed in mph. Positive = tailwind, negative = headwind.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Ambient temperature in Fahrenheit. Warmer air less dense = longer carry.
